name: studio.list_media
description: Enumerate media assets (images, documents, video) uploaded to an Actium Studio site.
whenToUse: Resolve image URLs for inclusion in a page or post body before calling update_page/update_post.
Storage audit: enumerate assets larger than some threshold for cleanup.
Before an upload step, check whether the asset is already present to avoid duplication.
whenNotToUse: Caller already has the media URL — skip listing; just reference the URL directly.
Caller is looking for page content, not asset metadata — use studio.list_pages / studio.get_page.
Caller wants to upload a new asset — this skill only reads; upload is a separate skill.
